caption: A man with glasses and a tall, grey, stylized wig sits in a podcast studio. He is wearing a white dress shirt with a red and white patterned bowtie and tan suspenders, and he has large black headphones over his ears. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone with a black pop filter. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous small, framed photographs, and various clothing items hang on racks. On-screen graphics are visible on both sides of the man; the left side displays a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," while the right side shows the text "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his head and adjusting his facial expression while looking toward the left, as if engaging in a conversation.
